SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight

Class FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight.FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder
Enclosing class:
FlightSqlFederatedCatalog
public static final class FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder extends Object
Builder for FlightSqlFederatedCatalog. endpoint, computeContext, and at least one table(...) are required.

  • Method Details

    • endpoint

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder endpoint(String url)
      Required. Flight SQL endpoint URL, e.g. http://host:32010.

    • computeContext

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder computeContext(String computeContext)
      Required. Stable, unique identifier for this remote. Federation only collapses sub-plans that share a compute context, so two distinct remotes must have distinct values.

    • schemaName

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder schemaName(String schemaName)
      Optional. Schema name under which the registered tables appear. Defaults to public.

    • username

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder username(String username)
      Optional. Username for basic-auth Handshake.

    • password

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder password(String password)
      Optional. Password for basic-auth Handshake.

    • header

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder header(String name, String value)
      Optional. Sets a gRPC header on every Flight SQL request. The header name is sent as name.toLowerCase() (gRPC convention).

    • option

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder option(String key, String value)
      Raw escape hatch for arbitrary option keys accepted by the builder.

    • table

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder table(String name)
      Registers a remote table. The name must resolve as a SQL identifier on the remote Flight SQL service; the builder fetches the schema at build() time by issuing a SELECT * FROM <name> WHERE 1 = 0 query.

    • build

      public FlightSqlFederatedCatalog build()
      Opens the Flight SQL connection, fetches table schemas, and returns a ready catalog.
